title: Nullified Logs
description: Inspired by Stay True. Tweaks log textures to be more rounded while staying vanilla.
body:
One of my favorite packs is [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true). My favorite part, out of all the really complex connected textures and such, was actually the log textures. However, since, haimcyfly seems to have deleted their CurseForge account, and removed the log top textures. So, this pack focuses entirely on wood. Every wood that is added, I'll add it to this pack. I am planning on adding wood types from Oh The Biomes You Go and Wilder Wild (along with others) eventually, but I have more resource packs lined up.

Currently it supports all Vanilla logs released/announced by 11/2/2024, along with Biomes O' Plenty logs.

I'm also thinking of incorporating connected textures, so be on the lookout for that.

PLANNED COMPATIBILITY:
BetterNether
Eternal Starlight
Cinderscapes
Terrestria
Regions Unexplored
Quark
Ecologics
The Aether
